title: australina muelleri
intro: Australina muelleri, also known as the Australian finger lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Haemodoraceae. The medicinal properties of Australina muelleri include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of using Australina muelleri include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, Australina muelleri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
